about-204.title: About 204
about-204.text:
About 204
.Content
.Interactive
HOME
About
Products
Magic Mirror
AI Photo Booth
Live Visuals
Augmented Art
Custom Work
portfolio
Contact
Who is 204?
204 is a creative technology studio building real-time interactive systems and immersive visual experiences.
Our work sits at the intersection of AI, motion, identity, and live environments,  translating ideas into responsive worlds.
Our Two Main Pillars
CONTENT
CREATION
AI-powered visuals, generative storytelling, and immersive media
Explore Content
Interactive
Formats
Installations powered by AI, motion tracking, and responsive environments.
Explore Interactive
Worldbuilding in Practice
From concept to physical and digital environments, we lead creative direction, develop interactive technologies, and produce immersive spatial experiences.
01.
Experience Design
We understand your audience, objectives, and environment.
02.
System Development
We define the experience mode, visual identity, and technical setup.
03.
Technical Production
We develop the AI models, interaction logic, and visual worlds.
04.
Strategic Consulting
We deploy, calibrate, and ensure seamless on-site performance.
Features
How to get the mirror for your next brand event or exhibition
TOUCH PROMPTING
Activate prompts through touching an object of your choice
LORA TRAINING
Artist? Brand? Unique style? We can train a Lora to keep style consisency when using the mirror
CUSTOM FRAMES
Create a custom frame around the mirror to make a more immersive or brand consistent ecperience
MIRROR APP
Control prompts and record your experience in the Magic Mirror app
The Makers
204 is led by a core team spanning creative direction, AI systems, art direction, and technical development.
Creative technologist &
Founder
Dimitri De Jonghe
Creative Director &
founder
Cintia Aguiar Pinto
Art Director &
Co-Founder
Cecilia Hübinette
Ai arts director & Artist
Dan Brown
Marketing
Laura Coimbra
RnA Studio: Our Physical Lab in Lisbon
RnA Studio is our experimental space where ideas are developed, tested, and exhibited.
A hybrid studio and cultural platform hosting workshops, installations, and collaborative projects, connecting our work with the local and international creative community.
RNA STUDIO
Global Partners & Distribution

The Magic Mirror.
One system. Multiple
experiences.
A real-time interactive system that transforms and places your audience at the center of the experience.
BRING THE MAGIC MIRROR TO YOUR EVENT
Designed for Active Participation
Every photobooth tells the story of your event to be taken home, re-inimagined., adapts to your audience, brand, and space.
Increases Dwell TIme
Encourage interaction
Shareable moments
Campaign & BRAND aligned prompts
BUILT TO ADAPT
One system. Multiple modes.
Infinite ways to activate your audience.
01.
Identity Transformation
Guests become alternate versions of themselves in real time.
02.
Living Art
Participants step inside and animate iconic or branded artworks.
05.
Environement Control
Movement influences the surrounding visual environment.
06.
Game Mode
Interactive challenges layered into immersive worlds.
07.
Neurofeedback
Brain activity drives responsive live visuals.
Features

about-us.title: AboutUs
about-us.text:
AboutUs
.Content
.Interactive
HOME
About
portfolio
Contact
fast, flexible, and fuelled by emotion
who is 204.content?
Never lose the human touch. Every project follows a living workflow-fluid, adaptive, and driven by imagination. Human creativity, precision, and curation shape impactful, emotion-driven content.
01.
DISCOVERY CALL
Every story begins with a conversation. We learn your goals, tone, and intent.
02.
VISION & STYLE
We define a visual language that speaks your brand’s soul.
03.
SHOOT OR GENERATE
We blend AI tools with human direction to create fast, adaptive visuals.
04.
EDIT & REFINE
Editing, grading, and storytelling, all shaped by human eyes.
05.
DELIVER & EVOLVE
We adapt. Iterate. Reimagine. Because every story keeps unfolding.

The AI Photo Booth.  Instant transformations.  Branded take-home moments.
A real-time AI portrait experience that transforms guests into custom identities - and sends them home with a branded memory in hand.
Designed to integrate seamlessly into festivals, brand activations, conferences and cultural events.
BRING THE AI Photo BOOTH TO YOUR EVENT
Made for Shareable Impact
The AI Photo Booth captures the attention, invites participation, and creates moments people want to share.
‍
Each portrait can be aligned with your visual identity, campaign narrative, or spatial concept.
Created for Active Participation
Every photobooth tells the story of your event to be taken home, re-inimagined., adapts to your audience, brand, and space.
Custom visual worlds & AI characters
Branded booth and interface design
Print framing and digital formats
Campaign-aligned prompts
Take-home branded souvenir
Features
How to get the mirror for your next brand event or exhibition

augmented-art.text:
Augmented Art
.Content
.Interactive
HOME
About
Products
Magic Mirror
AI Photo Booth
Live Visuals
Augmented Art
Custom Work
portfolio
Contact
Augmented Art.  Added motion. Added story. Added depth.
Augmented Art brings physical artworks to life through real-time generative layers.
Designed to extend narrative, atmosphere, and spatial impact - without altering the original piece.
BRING THE DREAMSBOOTH TO YOUR EVENT
Designed for Narrative Depth
Augmented Art enhances exhibitions, brand spaces, and installations by introducing subtle movement, evolving atmospheres, and layered storytelling.
Each augmentation is aligned with the artwork, the concept, and the environment it inhabits.
One Creative Process. Multiple Surfaces.
01.
Paintings
Subtle generative layers that bring static artworks into motion without altering the original piece.
02.
Large Scale Murals
Architectural-scale augmentations designed to expand narrative and atmosphere across entire walls.
03.
Natural Landscapes
Site-specific visual layers adapted to organic textures, cliffs, and environmental formations.
04.
Sculptural Forms
Projection-mapped visual systems that wrap around three-dimensional objects and installations.
Features
How to get the mirror for your next brand event or exhibition

custom-work.title: Custom Work
custom-work.text:
Custom Work
.Content
.Interactive
HOME
About
Products
Magic Mirror
AI Photo Booth
Live Visuals
Augmented Art
Custom Work
portfolio
Contact
Integrated Experiences. Built around your space, audience, and concept. Designed Around Context
We act as both creative and technical partners - from early concept development to system architecture, content creation, and on-site execution.
Our team combines real-time engines, projection systems, AI pipelines, and spatial interaction design into cohesive environments.
Start your project
One Creative Process. Multiple Surfaces.
01.
Magic Mirror Modules
Identity-driven transformation systems that can be embedded into performances, stages, and spatial environments.
02.
Environmental Control Systems
Real-time atmosphere engines influencing lighting, projections, and spatial mood dynamically.
03.
AI Content Pipelines
Custom generative visuals built specifically for your narrative, brand, or performance.
04.
Gesture & Body Tracking
Interactive systems allowing performers or audiences to shape visuals through movement.
04.
Architectural Projection
Precision mapping systems designed for buildings, domes, installations, and natural formations.
04.
Data-driven Visual Systems
Visual environments responding to live data, sound, sensors, or environmental inputs.
Creative & Technical Direction
We provide consultancy across concept development, spatial strategy, technical planning, and real-time system design.
Whether integrating into an existing production or developing a fully custom installation, we guide the project from idea to execution.
Features
How to get the mirror for your next brand event or exhibition
TOUCH PROMPTING
Activate prompts through touching an object of your choice
LORA TRAINING
Artist? Brand? Unique style? We can train a Lora to keep style consisency when using the mirror
CUSTOM FRAMES
Create a custom frame around the mirror to make a more immersive or brand consistent ecperience
MIRROR APP
Control prompts and record your experience in the Magic Mirror app
Seen In The Wild
Lisbon, Portugal || 2026
Delulu
Portugal || 2025
Wines Around The World
See all our work
Our Approach
Creative direction and technical architecture in one system.Integrated thinking from concept to execution.
Integrated Systems
We design cohesive environments where content, interaction, and projection are developed together — not assembled from separate vendors.
Real-Time Expertise
We design cohesive environments where content, interaction, and projection are developed together — not assembled from separate vendors.
Site-Specific Thinking
We design cohesive environments where content, interaction, and projection are developed together — not assembled from separate vendors.
Creative + Technical Direction
We design cohesive environments where content, interaction, and projection are developed together — not assembled from separate vendors.

HOME
About
Products

AI Photo Booth
Live Visuals

Custom Work
portfolio

Interactive Experiences. Participatory Worlds.
AI-powered installations built to increase engagement, memorability, and emotional impact across brands, culture, and performance art.
Why 204?
204.ai designs and builds real-time interactive installations powered by AI, motion, and responsive systems. We combine storytelling, engineering and visual design to transform brand identity into immersive experiences.
The 204 Experience
Four scalable systems designed for different modes of engagement.  Each format can stand alone or expand to suit your brand, theme or venue. Fully customizable. Engineered for real-time impact.
Magic Mirror
AI Photobooth
Augmented Art
Live Visuals
VJing
Augmented art
Custom work
Featured Work
Magic Mirror at Hulaween festival
Hulaween
Neuro feedback Mirror
1N: EEG Mirror
Magic Mirror Experience X Burst Style
Burst || Francisco Carolinum Linz
Augmented Art for Auriece Vettier
Mazarine
See all our work
Have Something Else in Mind? We Build It Custom for You
Contact us
Types of Experiences
Our interactive installations respond to audience movement in real time, transforming spaces into living, participatory worlds.
Brand Activations & Experiences
Corporate Events, Award Shows & Conventions
Museums & Artist Collaborations
Dance & Musical Performances
Festivals & Events
Immersive Spaces
Our Impact
Increased audience engagement
Longer dwell time
Shareable branded content
Emotional memorability
Scalable, modular formats
Local processing & data privacy
Full brand alignment
Clear visual differentiation

live-visuals.text:
Live VIsuals
.Content
.Interactive
HOME
About
Products
Magic Mirror
AI Photo Booth
Live Visuals
Augmented Art
Custom Work
portfolio
Contact
Interactive Visuals.  Real-time worlds at architectural scale.
Interactive Visuals transform stages, buildings, landscapes, and performers into responsive visual environments.Perfect for concerts, festivals, installations, and large-scale projections — from intimate venues to cliffs and architectural surfaces.
BRING THE Live Visual Systems TO YOUR EVENT
Designed for Impactful Moments
Live Interactive Visuals extend beyond screens. We design responsive atmospheres that react to
Music
Movement
Weather Data
Audience Interaction
Performance Energy
Features
How to get the mirror for your next brand event or exhibition
TOUCH PROMPTING
Activate prompts through touching an object of your choice
LORA TRAINING
Artist? Brand? Unique style? We can train a Lora to keep style consisency when using the mirror
CUSTOM FRAMES
Create a custom frame around the mirror to make a more immersive or brand consistent ecperience
MIRROR APP
Control prompts and record your experience in the Magic Mirror app
One system. Multiple modes.
Infinite ways to activate your audience.
01.
Stage Visuals
Real-time visuals designed to amplify musical energy and live performance atmosphere.
02.
Architectural Mapping
Large-scale projection systems transforming buildings and structures into dynamic visual surfaces.
05.
Landscape Projections
Immersive visuals adapted to natural terrain and expansive outdoor environments.
06.
Dome Environments
Full-surround immersive visuals designed for 360° spatial experiences.
07.
Interactive Systems
Responsive visual layers reacting to performers, audience movement, and live input.
Other Features
Environment Control Magic Mirror
Interactive Visuals can integrate with Magic Mirror’s Environment Control Mode, allowing performers or audiences to influence visuals in real time.
Gesture control. Body tracking. Audience-driven atmospheres.
Custom Content Layer
All visuals can be built using 204’s generative content pipeline - including AI-created environments, adaptive textures, and augmented surface techniques.
From dancer-reactive systems to cliff-mapped visuals designed specifically for natural formations.

// Wait for the DOM to be ready
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
// Get the button element by its ID
var button = document.getElementById('controlnetbutton-1');
// Check if the button element exists
if(button) {
// Add a click event listener to the button
button.addEventListener('click', function() {
// Trigger the click event of the button on the other page
triggerButtonClickOnOtherPage();
});
}
// Function to trigger the button click on the other page
function triggerButtonClickOnOtherPage() {
// You need to replace 'other-page-button-id' with the ID of the button on the other page
var otherPageButton = document.getElementById('controlnetbutton');
// Check if the button on the other page exists
if(otherPageButton) {
// Trigger a click event on the button
otherPageButton.click();
} else {
console.error('Button on the other page not found!');
}
